Age Calculator

Calculate exact age from date of birth to today or any cutoff date. Useful for school admissions, government exams, jobs and official forms.

No Signup
Browser-based
Free to use
Privacy-first
Files stay on your device. Not uploaded anywhere.

Calculate exact age

Useful for exam, school, job and government forms.

Enter a valid date of birth and target date. The target date must be after the date of birth.

Advertisement

Ad space reserved for future

Advertisement space

Ad space reserved for future

Exact age calculator for Indian forms

Many Indian forms ask for age on a specific cutoff date instead of age today. This tool helps you calculate the exact years, months and days between your date of birth and any target date.

Common uses

  • School admission age checks
  • SSC, UPSC, railway and state exam eligibility
  • Job application age limits
  • Insurance, pension and service records

Tip

Always use the exact cutoff date written in the official notification, not the application submission date.

Practical guidance for Age Calculator

Calculate exact age in years, months and days for school forms, exam applications, job portals and official documents. Student tools are useful for exam forms, identity updates, scholarship portals, and job applications that reject files outside strict limits. JaldiDocs is designed for everyday Indian document workflows where a small mismatch in size, format, page order, or file weight can cause an upload to fail.

Before you use the tool

  • Keep the original file unchanged so you can restart if a form has a different requirement.
  • Check whether the portal asks for pixels, millimetres, page size, file format, or maximum KB/MB.
  • Use a clear file name without special symbols before uploading to government, exam, tax, or business portals.

After downloading

  • Read the latest official notification before final submission.
  • Match both dimensions and file size, because many portals validate both.
  • Keep the original file unchanged so you can make a new version if a portal rejects the first one.
  • Open the final file once on your device and confirm it is readable before submitting it anywhere.

Privacy and accuracy note

The tool runs in your browser wherever possible, which means your file is processed on your own device instead of being uploaded to JaldiDocs. Official requirements can still change, so always compare the output with the latest instructions from the website or organization where you plan to submit it.
